title: Legendary Equipment
description: This mod adds 5 new swords with special abilities, the fire sword, thunder sword, ice sword, heal sword and the tnt sword
body:
This is Legendary Equipment, a mod that adds 4 new types of swords that have special abilities.
This mod adds the Fire Sword, a sword that put fire on your opponent. we have the thunder sword too, a fast sword that launches a thunder when used. another good swordis the heal sword, it works like a "vampire sword", it heals 3 hearts and half when used. The ice sword applies slowness to the target and spawns ice when used. The last sword is the TNT sword, like the normal tnt, it explodes, but when you uses it, and the sword remains intact.
Stay tuned to updates of this mod and my other mods at my instagram channel: https://www.instagram.com/o_yoshi1014/
